data.title: WLFI has bought about $1 million of SEI in the past two months
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to Ember Monitoring, WLFI, a DeFi project supported by the Trump family, purchased $775,000 of SEI at $0.158 yesterday. In the past two months, WLFI spent about 1 million USDC to purchase 5.983 million SEI through 3 transactions, with an average price of $1.67. Currently, SEI is one of the only three tokens in WLFI's portfolio that have not lost money (the other two are TRX and AVAX).

data.title: Alchemy Pay Unveils Strategic Roadmap for 2025
data.description:
According to Foresight News, cryptocurrency payment solutions provider Alchemy Pay has released its strategic roadmap for 2025, outlining its transformation from a crypto payment gateway to a global financial hub. The company plans to prioritize regulatory growth in regions such as South Korea and Australia, while expanding partnerships with wallets, public blockchains, and decentralized exchanges.

Alchemy Pay aims to evolve from a payment gateway to a global financial center supporting risk-weighted assets. This shift will involve collaboration with RWA service providers to integrate and promote RWA investments. Additionally, Alchemy Chain is set to develop into a public blockchain centered around stablecoins, aggregating liquidity and utility of major global and local stablecoins like USDT and USDC across various blockchain networks.

The company is also working on an AI-powered crypto payment product, which is intended to become the standard payment infrastructure within the AI Agent ecosystem.

data.title: Gate.io Launchpool Lists Hivello (HVLO)
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Gate.io will start HVLO staking mining from 17:00 on April 13 to 17:00 on April 18 (UTC+8). Staking HVLO and GT to participate in Launchpool will share 19,320,184 HVLO airdrops. Among them, the HVLO mining pool is expected to reach an annualized rate of 218.57%, and the GT mining pool is expected to reach an annualized rate of 5.79%. Early staking is now open.

data.title: Market Uncertainty Rises as S&P Volatility Index Peaks
data.description: According to PANews, senior analyst James Van Straten has reported that the S&P Volatility Index has surged to its highest level since August of last year, indicating increased market uncertainty. The ratio of Bitcoin to the VIX has reached a long-term trend line at 1903. The last time this trend line was reached was during market fluctuations surrounding the unwinding of yen carry trades, when Bitcoin's price had dropped to a low of approximately $49,000. This marks the fourth instance of the ratio hitting the trend line and bottoming out. Previously, this ratio touched the trend line during the peak of the pandemic in March 2020 and for the first time in August 2015, with prices rising after both instances.

data.title: In 2020, the ETH whale is suspected of selling 1,000 ETH again, leaving only 1,018 ETH in its holdings
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News According to the monitoring of on-chain data analyst @ai_9684xtpa, "the 2020 ETH whale with a cost as low as $588" was suspected to have sold 1,000 ETH again 12 hours ago. Calculated at the current price, it is about $1.65 million. If true, this cash-out will make a profit of about $1.064 million.
The whale had reduced its position two days ago, and its current ETH position has dropped to 1,018, and it is not expected to cause a large selling pressure on the market.

data.title: Alchemy Pay releases 2025 roadmap: Alchemy Chain will become a stablecoin public chain and plans to launch AI payment products
ICO whales sell another 632 ETH, cashing out over $8 million in April, still holding over 30,000 ETH
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News According to the monitoring of chain data analyst @ai_9684xtpa, a whale who participated in the Ethereum ICO at a price of about 0.31 in 2015 and received a total of 100,000 ETH sold 632 ETH again 5 hours ago, worth about 1.04 million US dollars.
The address has sold a total of 4,812 ETH since April, equivalent to about 8.09 million US dollars. The address currently still holds 30,189 ETH, with a total value of more than 50 million US dollars at the current price.

data.title: Florida federal court approves NBA star O'Neal's NFT lawsuit settlement
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Florida federal court judge Federico Moreno finally approved NBA star O'Neal's $11 million class action settlement with Astrals non-fungible token (NFT) buyers this week. The judge stated in the order issued that the plaintiffs have reviewed and approved the fees requested by the lead class counsel as fair and reasonable.

data.title: Shaquille O'Neal Settles NFT Lawsuit for $11 Million
data.description: According to Odaily, a federal judge in Florida, Federico Moreno, has approved a settlement agreement involving NBA star Shaquille O'Neal. The agreement resolves a class-action lawsuit with buyers of Astrals non-fungible tokens (NFTs) for $11 million. The judge stated that the plaintiffs have reviewed and approved the fees requested by the lead class attorney as fair and reasonable.

data.title: Early Ethereum Investor Continues Significant ETH Sales in April
data.description: According to PANews, an early Ethereum investor, known for participating in the 2015 ICO with 100,000 ETH, has recently sold 632 ETH, valued at approximately $1.04 million. This sale occurred five hours ago, contributing to a total of 4,812 ETH sold since the beginning of April, amounting to roughly $8.09 million. The investor acquired these tokens at a cost of $0.31 per ETH and still retains a substantial holding of 30,189 ETH.
